summary: UNIFIED FLOW VERIFIED: Enjoy RSVP, Stay Booking, and Universal Search all correctly create entries in all 3 collections (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes). Fixed minor bug in stay_routes.py where property_id was undefined.

minor.issue: property_id was undefined in channel_intakes metadata - FIXED

TEST_03_enjoy_rsvp_creates_notification.details: POST /api/enjoy/rsvp creates admin_notifications entry with read: false, pillar: enjoy

TEST_04_enjoy_rsvp_creates_service_desk_.details: POST /api/enjoy/rsvp creates service_desk_tickets entry with pillar='enjoy'

TEST_05_enjoy_rsvp_creates_channel_intak.details: POST /api/enjoy/rsvp creates channel_intakes entry with pillar='enjoy', request_type='enjoy_rsvp'

TEST_07_stay_booking_creates_notificatio.details: POST /api/stay/booking-request creates admin_notifications entry with read: false, pillar: stay

TEST_08_stay_booking_creates_channel_int.details: POST /api/stay/booking-request creates channel_intakes entry with pillar='stay'

TEST_09_universal_search_creates_signal.details: GET /api/search/universal?q=dog creates signal with ticket_id, notification_id, inbox_id

TEST_10_universal_search_creates_notific.details: Universal search creates admin_notifications entry with read: false, type: search_signal

TEST_11_universal_search_creates_channel.details: Universal search creates channel_intakes entry with channel='search', category='search_signal'

TEST_12_search_intelligent_suggestions.details: Search correctly detects intents: discovery_intent, booking_intent, order_intent, question_intent

TEST_13_search_min_length_for_signal.details: Search only creates signal for queries >= 3 chars

enjoy_rsvp.notification: VERIFIED - enjoy_routes.py lines 383-425 creates admin_notifications with read: False
enjoy_rsvp.ticket: VERIFIED - enjoy_routes.py lines 336-362 creates tickets collection

stay_booking.notification: VERIFIED - stay_routes.py lines 574-607 creates admin_notifications with read: False, pillar: stay
stay_booking.ticket: VERIFIED - stay_routes.py lines 609-631 creates ticket via create_ticket_from_event
stay_booking.channel_intake: VERIFIED - stay_routes.py lines 633-662 creates channel_intakes (FIXED property_id bug)

universal_search.notification: VERIFIED - server.py lines 7051-7076 creates admin_notifications with read: False, type: search_signal
universal_search.ticket: VERIFIED - server.py lines 7078-7107 creates service_desk_tickets with status: signal
universal_search.channel_intake: VERIFIED - server.py lines 7109-7139 creates channel_intakes with channel: search

critical_code_review_comments: enjoy_routes.py correctly implements full unified flow: notification → ticket → service_desk_ticket → channel_intake
stay_routes.py correctly implements unified flow with auto-ticket creation via create_ticket_from_event()
server.py universal search correctly implements unified flow with signal detection and intent classification
All notifications have read: false field for API compatibility
All entries have cross-reference IDs (notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id) for traceability
updated_files: /app/backend/stay_routes.py - Fixed property_id undefined bug in channel_intakes metadata
seed_data_creation: Test RSVP, booking, and search entries created with unique TEST-* prefixed IDs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified flow verified for Enjoy RSVP, Stay Booking, and Universal Search. All 3 pillars correctly create entries in admin_notifications (with read: false), service_desk_tickets, and channel_intakes. Fixed minor bug in stay_routes.py where property_id was undefined in channel_intakes metadata.
api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/enjoy/rsvp - Creates RSVP with unified flow (notification + ticket + service_desk_ticket + inbox)
POST /api/stay/booking-request - Creates stay booking with unified flow (notification + ticket + inbox)
GET /api/search/universal?q=dog&create_signal=true - Creates search signal with unified flow
